title: Southwest Gas Seeks to Move Forward with Renewable Natural Gas Supply from Food and Wastewater in California
content: Southwest Gas Corporation (Southwest Gas) has submitted a procurement agreement to the California Public Utilities Commission (CPUC) that would bring renewable natural gas (RNG) to its California customers, marking an important step in supporting the state's goals to reduce emissions from short-lived climate pollutants.This RNG procurement agreement has the potential to reduce emissions from natural gas delivered to Southwest Gas' California customers.
author: Analysts Account
